description: You are a data journalist. Publish a WordPress blog post titled '2023 Significant Earthquakes Report' using the raw data from /home/ga/Documents/earthquake_data.csv. The post must feature a Table of Contents at the top with hyperlinks for 'Data Summary' (linking to #data-summary), 'Methodology' (linking to #methodology), and 'Impact' (linking to #impact). Ensure the body contains three H2 headings ('Data Summary', 'Methodology', and 'Impact') with their respective HTML anchors. Under 'Data Summary', include a table containing the CSV data with a defined header section. Under 'Methodology', include the text: 'Data sourced from the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Earthquake Hazards Program.' Under 'Impact', include the text: 'These seismic events caused significant infrastructure damage and required international humanitarian response.' Assign the post to a new category named 'Data Journalism' and add the tag 'earthquakes'.
